allies.rationale_text: First-principles-thinking strengthens creative-destruction by stripping away inherited assumptions before building the replacement logic.
allies.source_quote: stripping away assumptions to leave only a set of facts and a desired outcome

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps creative-destruction identify what in the current machine must actually be replaced rather than merely criticized.
allies.source_quote: understand how a system is currently structured and how a new one will function

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias blocks creative-destruction when teams defend the incumbent logic instead of killing their own wrong ideas.
antagonists.source_quote: confirmation bias leads teams to process information to get the conclusion they want

structured_tensions.tension_text: Creative-destruction conflicts with status-quo-bias when incumbent comfort delays necessary replacement of obsolete offerings.
structured_tensions.source_quote: creative-destruction vs status-quo-bias: incumbent comfort delays necessary replacement of obsolete offerings.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Creative-destruction conflicts with commitment-and-consistency-bias when public prior strategy blocks timely reinvention.
structured_tensions.source_quote: creative-destruction vs commitment-and-consistency-bias: public prior strategy blocks timely reinvention.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
